title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Bombay Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at IIT Bombay Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Curriculum Developer looking for your next big career move? IIT Bombay Digital Technologies in Rajkot offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About IIT Bombay Digital Technologies:
IIT Bombay Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay Digital Technologies!
